strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience, meeting the minimum tenure requirement.
Strong entrepreneurial and startup background, highlighted by founding the open-source platform GISCollective.
Recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and cloud platforms.
concerns: Lacks the preferred advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
Limited demonstrated experience in high-level AI strategy or advising strategic enterprise customers at a Director level.
AI expertise appears relatively recent and focused on tooling rather than deep, recognized industry leadership in AI/ML.
response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum 15-year engineering experience requirement and brings valuable entrepreneurial and open-source contributions. He also has relevant recent hands-on experience building AI infrastructure and cloud tools. However, the candidate's background is primarily as a Staff/Senior Software Engineer rather than a Director-level Principal, and he lacks the deep, recognized AI strategic leadership and advanced AI academic credentials preferred for guiding enterprise-wide AI adoption.
